title: Modded Swords x Punchy! Compatibility
description: Adds compatibility to many sword mods with the Punchy! mod
body:
This texture pack adds compatibility with the [punchy!](https://modrinth.com/mod/punchy-fpa) mod when rotating objects (specifically weapons).

---
**Note: If you want me to add compatibility with more mods, join the mod's Discord server in the creations/addons/modded swords section and send a message, also if you find any bugs**

See the gallery for details.

Looking for Forge mods?
[Modded swords v2](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modded-swords-x-punchy!-v2)

### mods compatible 1.20.1 - 1.21.1
**(RPG Series)**
1. [Archers (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers)
2. [Paladins & Priests (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests)
3. [Wizards (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards)
4. [Rogues & Warriors (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rogues-and-warriors)
5. [Berserker rpg class](https://modrinth.com/mod/berserker-rpg-class)
6. [Loot n explore](https://modrinth.com/mod/loot-n-explore)
7. [LNE rogues](https://modrinth.com/mod/lne-rogues)
8. [LNE wizards Add-On](https://modrinth.com/mod/lne-wizards)
9. [Berserker rpg class](https://modrinth.com/mod/berserker-rpg-class)
10. [Arsenal (rpg series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/arsenal-rpg-series)
11. [LNE paladins](https://modrinth.com/mod/lne-paladins)
12. [Elemental wizards rpg](https://modrinth.com/mod/elemental-wizards-rpg)
13. [Witcher rpg class](https://modrinth.com/mod/witcher-rpg-class)
14. [Death knights](https://modrinth.com/mod/death-knights)
15. [Forcemaster rpg class](https://modrinth.com/mod/forcemaster-rpg-class)
16. [Mercenaries and artificers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mercenaries-and-artificers)

**Farmers delight**
1. [Farmers delight refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)
2. [Ends delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/ends-delight)
3. [Nethers delight refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/nethers-delight-refabricated)
4. [Betterenddelight](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterenddelight)

**Simply swords**
1. [Simply more](https://modrinth.com/mod/simplymore)
2. [Simply swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords)
3. [Mythic Metals + Simply Swords (compat)](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythicmetals)
4. [epic knights](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-shields-armor-and-weapons)

**Mini bosses/bosses/mobs**
1. [Aquamirae](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquamirae) 
2. [Bosses of mass destruction](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction)
3. [Mutant monsters](https://modrinth.com/mod/mutant-monsters)
4. [Myths of the sea](https://modrinth.com/mod/myths-of-the-sea)
5. [Illager Invasion](https://modrinth.com/mod/illager-invasion)
6. [Earth & Water](https://modrinth.com/mod/earth-and-water)
7. [Enderman overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderman-overhaul)
8. [Companions!](https://modrinth.com/mod/companions-mod)
10. [knight quest](https://modrinth.com/mod/knight-quest)

**New dimension**
1. [Betterend](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)
2. [The twilight forest unofficial](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-twilight-forest-unofficial)
3. [Jadens nether expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/jadens-nether-expansion)
4. [Deeperdarker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker)
5. [Mine Cells ](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecells)

**Game mechanics**
1. [Immersive weathering](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-weathering)
2. [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) 
3. [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)
4. [Trowel](https://modrinth.com/mod/trowel)



The new version is now compatible with [better combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) it is recommended to use the mod for a better experience.
